patterns.migration_pattern: Alembic migrations follow standard pattern with upgrade() creating indexes via op.create_index() and downgrade() reversing via op.drop_index(). Migration file name: YYYYMMDD_HHMM-<short_hash>_<slug>.py. Latest migration revision ID: 9464b9d89de7 (feat-trigger)
patterns.index_naming: Index names use op.f('ix_<table>_<column(s)>') format, e.g., op.f('ix_chat_history_user_id'). Composite index columns are passed as a list.
patterns.index_order: Composite index column order matters - most selective column first. For (user_id, project_id, created_at DESC): user_id is integer (most selective), project_id is string, created_at is timestamp.

existing_implementations.description: ChatHistory model exists at server/app/model/chat/chat_history.py with user_id (index=True) and project_id (index=True, nullable). The get_grouped_histories() and get_grouped_project() in chat_service.py filter by user_id and project_id. Existing single-column indexes: ix_chat_history_user_id, ix_chat_history_task_id, ix_chat_history_project_id
